name: Bean Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients by browning the hamburger and cooking the bacon.
2. Chop the onion.
3. Combine all the bean cans in a bowl.
4. Mix together the brown sugar, catsup, vinegar, and mustard.
5. Pour the mixture over the beans and mix well.
6. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 1-1/2 hours until heated through.
